0091 ususa) {mg ooowz 4: L71»; a nan 22:3 Beware mg; mg (4: m m)mu21u€(g‘ung)$mp2wammmzfit (mama mm; [(I!)s 1798441] mm] AHVNIGHOVHLXEI : VIGNI :10 ELLLEIZVD 3m 17 -- 4 of 6 -- lwlliawgstim www:ww S wmmmfimmmfiamustfiwmiwfitmafim mamaoaagm.matzmmmarm¢amw-wmfi warm firm strewn I [IstJiW/13013/652M3fl/11-12ramn W (240.00 -27o.00) 1mm arr-him em‘r, xii-gm Hm MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th June, 2013 5.0. 1462(E).- Whereas, by notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways number 8.0. 465 (E) dated the 26th April, 2002 issued under section 11 of the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 (68 of 1988) the Central Government has entrusted the stretch from Kilometer [82.040 to Kilometer 316.000 (Tamil Nadu/Kerala Border — Kochi section) of National Highway No. 47 in the State of Kerala to the National Highways Authority of India (hereinafter referred to as the Authority); And whereas, pursuant to the provision of section 14 of the National Highways Authority of India Act, I988 (68 of 1988), the Authority has entered into an agreement (hereinafter referred to as said agreement) with M/s. Thrissur Expressway Private Limited, having its registered office at MCH No. 555, Arora Colony, Road No. 3, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad — 500034, India (hereinafter referred to as the “Concessionaire”), the successful bidder for bids submitted on 25.02.2009 for the development of Vadakkaneherry — Thrissur Border section from Km. 240.00 to Km. 270.00 (Design chainage Km. 236.135 to Km. 264,490) on National Highway No. 47 (hereinafter referred to as the “said section”) to six lane divided carriageway and operate and maintenance of the said section. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of V 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 (hereinafter referred to as the “Rules”), the Central Government, having regard to the expenditure involved in building, maintenance, management and operation of the said section, interest on the capital invested, reasonable return, the volume of traffic and the period of the agreement entered into between the authority and the concessionaire, hereby notifies that there shall be levied and collected fees on mechanical vehicles for the use of the said section at the rate specified in columns (2) of the Table l for net road section length of 26.76 Kms. for use of the four and more lane sections (hereinafter referred to as “base rate") and at the base rates specified in the Table No. 2 for bridge/structure/ bypass costing Rupees Fifty crore or more on the Type of Vehicles specified in Table l and 2 below, and authorizes the said Concessionaire to collect and retain the fee on and from the date of commercial operation and on getting work Completion Certificate from NHAI or publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, whichever is later, till the termination date as specified in the agreement; Table I Type of Vehicle Base rate of fee per km for base year 2007-08 (in Rupees) (l) (2) Car, Jeep, Van or Light Motor Vehicle 0.65 Light Commercial Vehicle, Light Goods Vehicle or Mini Bus 1.05 Bus or Truck 2.20 Heavy Construction Machinery (HCM) or Earth Moving Equipment (EME) or 3.45 Multi Axle Vehicle (MAV) (Three to Six Axles) Oversized Vehicles (Seven or more Axles) 4.20 Table II Base rate of fee ( Rupees per vehicle per trip) Cost of permanent bridge, bypass or Car, Jeep, Light Commercial Truck HCM, EME Oversized tunnel (Rupees in crore) Van or Vehicle, Light or Bus or MAV Vehicle Light Goods Vehicle or (Three to (Seven or Motor Mini Bus Six Axles) more Axles) __ Vehicle 10 to 15 5 7,50 15 22 30 For every additional Rupees five crore 1 1,50 3 4.50 6 or part thereof, exceeding Rupees 2978 5] f3 —2 -- 5 of 6 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART 11 SEC. 3(ii)] fifteen crore and up to Rupees one l hundred crore t For every additional Rupees five crore 0.75 US 2.25 3.40 4.50 or part thereof, exceeding Rupees one hundred crore and upto Rupees two I hundred crore. Notes : - 1. The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plaza for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable Km 243.000 (Design Chainage Km 238. 750) of NH- 47 (near 26.76 Vadakkanchery-l villageIn Palakkad district) 2. In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bridge(s)/bypass(es)/strueture(s), cost of which is specified hereunder. at the following To” Plaza: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length (in km) and Cost of'l‘unnel/strueture (in Rupees crore) for which additional fee is payable for which Feels payable m; Length Cost Km./Ch. 243.000 (Design Chainage Km. 1.600 Km. Rs. 165.00 Crore 238.750) of NH-47 (near Vadakkanchery-I village in Palakkad district) The rate of monthly pass for a person who owns a mechanical vehicle registered for non-commercial purposes and resides within a distance of twenty kilometers from the toll plaza is Rs. 200.00 (Rupees Two Hundred Only) for the year 2012-13 which is subject to revision every year as per the provisions of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Coilection) Rules, 2008. ca 4. For multiple journey on the highway section, passes shall be issued at the following rates, namely. Amount Payable Maximum number ot‘one Period of validity wayjourneys allowed , ,, , ,, W One and half times of the fee for Two Twenty four hours from the time of one way journey payment Two-third of amount of the lee Fifty or more One month from date of payment payable for fifty or more single iourneys. 5. Mechanical vehicle which is loaded in excess of permissible load specilied for its category under the Rules. shall be liable to pay fee at such rates which is applicable for the next higher category of the vehicles and shall not be entitled to make use of the highway section unless the excess load has been removed ti'om such mechanical vehicle. 6. All definitions including category olirnechanical vehicles. its permissible load. category ot‘exemptcd vehicles. service road, alternative road etc. shall be as per definitions specified in the Rules. 7. The fee rates shall be displayed for information of the users in accordance with rules 12 ot' the said Rules. 8. Based on the Base rate of fee per km. for the base year 200108 as mentioned in Table-1 and Z. the actual amount of fee to be charged from the mechanical vehicles and the discounts will be calculated by the Authority and revised annually in accordance with the rule 5 01‘ the said rules provided that no revision shall be effected within six months and the same shall be published in at least one newspaper. each in English and vernacular language accordingly.
